title: Sardinian Lamb Gnocchi
description: A hearty and flavorful Italian dish featuring lamb and Sardinian gnocchi. This recipe is a unique twist on traditional gnocchi.

ingredients.name: Sardinian Gnocchi
ingredients.notes: found at Italian markets or online

instructions: Season lamb shoulder with salt, black pepper, and chopped rosemary.
Heat olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer skillet to the preheated oven and roast lamb for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
While lamb is cooking, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook Sardinian gnocchi according to package instructions until they float to the surface.
Remove lamb from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve sliced lamb on top of cooked gnocchi, topped with shaved Parmesan cheese.
Garnish with chopped rosemary and serve immediately.
